name: watch-arbitrage-mcp
title: Watch Arbitrage Tracker — Rolex/Patek/AP Cross-Platform Alerts
description: Cross-platform watch arbitrage for pro dealers. Tracks Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet across 6 marketplaces: Chrono24, The 1916 Company, Bob's Watches, Watchfinder, European Watch Company, Watches of Switzerland. Telegram alerts on >5% spreads vs trimmed cross-platform median. Pay-Per-Event.
